comments.ticket_summary: Add bulk export functionality to reporting dashboard
comments.author: Hannah Scott
comments.body: Ready for QA. Export works for CSV and XLSX up to 100k rows. Tested locally with production-sized datasets.

comments.ticket_summary: Implement rate limiting on public API endpoints
comments.author: Leo Martinez
comments.body: Ready for QA. Rate limiting applied per API key with configurable thresholds. Redis-backed sliding window.

comments.author: Anaya Osei
comments.body: Ready for QA. Segmentation service deployed to staging. Supports up to 50 rule conditions per segment.

comments.ticket_summary: Add webhook retry logic with exponential backoff
comments.author: Connor Walsh
comments.body: Ready for QA. Retry logic implemented with jitter. Max 5 retries over 24h. Dead-letter queue on final failure.

comments.ticket_summary: Fix checkout flow regression on mobile Safari
comments.author: QA Bot
comments.body: Ready for QA. Regression confirmed fixed in Safari 17.4. Tested on iPhone 14 and iPad Pro.

comments.ticket_summary: Upgrade React to v19 and resolve breaking changes
comments.author: Mei Lin
comments.body: Ready for QA. All breaking changes resolved. Bundle size reduced by 12%. No regressions in Storybook.

comments.ticket_summary: Address XSS vulnerability in comment editor
comments.author: Leo Martinez
comments.body: Ready for QA. Input sanitisation added using DOMPurify. Penetration test report attached.

mike_mentions.ticket_summary: Define Q3 roadmap priorities for platform team
mike_mentions.comment_body: Hey @Mike, can you confirm whether the data pipeline work is in scope for Q3 or pushed to Q4? Affects how we sequence the segmentation service.

mike_mentions.ticket_summary: Review and approve technical spec for new billing engine
mike_mentions.comment_body: @Mike the spec is ready for your review. Main decision needed: do we build the proration logic in-house or use Stripe's built-in handling?

mike_mentions.ticket_summary: Review and approve technical spec for new billing engine
mike_mentions.comment_body: Following up on James's comment @Mike — we're blocked on the billing engine spec until we have direction on this. Sprint planning is Thursday.

mike_mentions.ticket_summary: Review and approve technical spec for new billing engine
mike_mentions.comment_body: @Mike also need your sign-off on the self-serve upgrade flow UX before we can move GDCU-8619 to Done. Design is finalised, just waiting on approval.
